papers.title: DiffusionDrive: Truncated Diffusion Model for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Truncated diffusion policy with cascade decoder. 10x denoising step reduction, 88.1 PDMS on NAVSIM at 45 FPS.

papers.title: GoalFlow: Goal-Driven Flow Matching for Multimodal Trajectories Generation in End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Goal-driven flow matching for multimodal trajectory generation. 90.3 PDMS on NAVSIM with single denoising step.

papers.title: DriveTransformer: Unified Transformer for Scalable End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Simplified E2E-AD framework with task parallelism, sparse representation, and streaming processing. SOTA on Bench2Drive and nuScenes.

papers.title: ORION: A Holistic End-to-End Autonomous Driving Framework by Vision-Language Instructed Action Generation
papers.abstract: Combines QT-Former, LLM reasoning, and generative planner. Achieves 77.74 DS on Bench2Drive.

papers.title: OpenDriveVLA: Towards End-to-end Autonomous Driving with Large Vision Language Action Model
papers.abstract: Open-source VLA with hierarchical vision-language alignment for 2D+3D visual tokens. SOTA on nuScenes.

papers.title: DriveMoE: Mixture-of-Experts for Vision-Language-Action Model in End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: MoE-based VLA with Scene-Specialized Vision MoE and Skill-Specialized Action MoE. SOTA on Bench2Drive.

papers.title: Raw2Drive: Reinforcement Learning with Aligned World Models for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Dual-stream MBRL approach with privileged and raw sensor world models. Only RL-based E2E method on CARLA 2.0 and Bench2Drive.

papers.title: ReCogDrive: A Reinforced Cognitive Framework for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Autoregressive VLM + diffusion planner with DiffGRPO reinforcement. SOTA on NAVSIM and Bench2Drive.

papers.title: AutoVLA: A Vision-Language-Action Model for End-to-End Autonomous Driving with Adaptive Reasoning and Reinforcement Fine-Tuning
papers.abstract: Unifies reasoning and action generation within a single autoregressive model. Features dual thinking modes and GRPO-based reinforcement fine-tuning.

papers.title: World4Drive: End-to-End Autonomous Driving via Intention-aware Physical Latent World Model
papers.abstract: Vision foundation model-based latent world model for perception-annotation-free end-to-end planning. SOTA on nuScenes and NavSim.

papers.title: SGDrive: Scene-to-Goal Hierarchical World Cognition for Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Scene-to-goal hierarchical world cognition framework for end-to-end driving.

papers.title: See Less, Drive Better: Generalizable End-to-End Autonomous Driving via Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Explores using vision foundation models for generalizable end-to-end driving with reduced sensor input.

papers.title: HERMES: A Holistic End-to-End Risk-Aware Multimodal Embodied System with Vision-Language-Action Model
papers.abstract: Holistic VLA system integrating risk awareness for end-to-end autonomous driving.

papers.title: ResWorld: Temporal Residual World Model for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Temporal residual world model for learning future state prediction in end-to-end driving.

papers.title: Fine-tuning is Not Enough: A Parallel Framework for Collaborative Imitation and Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Proposes a parallel framework that combines imitation learning and reinforcement learning for end-to-end autonomous driving.

papers.title: Latent-WAM: Latent World Action Modeling for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Latent world-action joint modeling for end-to-end AD

papers.title: AutoDrive-P^3: Unified Chain of Perception-Prediction-Planning Thought via Reinforcement Fine-Tuning
papers.abstract: VLM-based P3 chain of thought with RL fine-tuning

papers.title: SparseDriveV2: Scoring is All You Need for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Scoring-based end-to-end multi-modal planning

papers.title: ExploreVLA: Dense World Modeling and Exploration for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: VLA with dense world model + exploration for end-to-end AD

papers.title: LMGenDrive: Bridging Multimodal Understanding and Generative World Modeling for End-to-End Driving
Learning Vision-Language-Action World Models for Autonomous Driving
Infrastructure-Centric World Models: Bridging Temporal Depth and Spatial Breadth for Roadside Perception
papers.abstract: First infrastructure-centric world model for roadside perception

papers.title: OneDrive: Unified Multi-Paradigm Driving with Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models(VLMs) excel at autoregressive text generation, yet end-to-end autonomous driving requires multi-task learning with structured outputs and heterogeneous decoding behaviors, such as autoregressive language generation, parallel object detection and trajectory regression. To accommodate these differences, existing systems typically introduce separate or cascaded decoders ...

papers.title: XEmbodied: Towards a Cloud-Side Vision-Language-Action Foundation Model for Embodied Agents
papers.abstract: Cloud-side VLA model accepting image+language+3D as input, supporting diverse embodied tasks including driving. Xiaomi Embodied Intelligence team. CVPR 2026.

papers.title: OneVL: One-Step Latent Reasoning and Planning with Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning has become a powerful driver of trajectory prediction in VLA-based autonomous driving, yet its autoregressive nature imposes a latency cost that is prohibitive for real-time deployment. Latent CoT methods attempt to close this gap by compressing reasoning into continuous hidden states, but consistently fall short of their explicit counterparts. We suggest that ...

papers.title: SpanVLA: Efficient Action Bridging and Learning from Negative-Recovery Samples for Vision-Language-Action Model
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models offer a promising autonomous driving paradigm for leveraging world knowledge and reasoning capabilities, especially in long-tail scenarios. However, existing VLA models often struggle with high latency in action generation using autoregressive frameworks. SpanVLA proposes efficient action bridging and negative-recovery sample learning for end-to-end autonomous driving.

papers.title: OccDirector: Language-Guided Behavior and Interaction Generation in 4D Occupancy Space
papers.abstract: Language-guided 4D occupancy world model for AD simulation

papers.title: UniVLT: A Unified Visual-Language-Transformer Powered Transportation Foundation Model
papers.abstract: Unified transportation VLA foundation model covering autonomous driving, traffic prediction, and related transportation tasks.

papers.title: CF-VLA: Efficient Coarse-to-Fine Action Generation for Vision-Language-Action Policies
papers.abstract: Addresses efficiency bottleneck in flow-based VLA policies by restructuring action generation into coarse initialization (action-aware starting point) with single-step local refinement. Achieves 75.4% latency reduction, outperforms NFE=2 methods and matches NFE=10 π0.5 baselines, 83.0% real-robot success rate.

papers.title: ProDrive: Proactive Planning for Autonomous Driving via Ego-Environment Co-Evolution
papers.abstract: World-model-based proactive planning framework enabling ego-environment co-evolution. Jointly trains a query-centric trajectory planner and a BEV world model end-to-end, generating diverse candidate trajectories and planning-aware future scene predictions.

papers.title: Don't Shake the Wheel: Momentum-Aware Planning in End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Momentum-aware planning with trajectory/perception momentum for stable long-horizon prediction. 26% collision reduction.

papers.title: Driving on Registers
papers.abstract: Novel register-based representation for autonomous driving perception and planning.

papers.title: MeanFuser: Fast One-Step Multi-Modal Trajectory Generation and Adaptive Reconstruction for Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Fast one-step multi-modal trajectory generation with adaptive reconstruction.

papers.title: DVGT-2: Dynamic Vision Graph Transformer for Trajectory Prediction 2.0
papers.abstract: Enhanced dynamic vision graph transformer for trajectory prediction.

papers.title: HAD: Combining Hierarchical Diffusion with Metric-Decoupled RL for End-to-End Driving
DriveVA: Video Action Models are Zero-Shot Drivers
BridgeSim: Unveiling the OL-CL Gap in End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Reveals root causes of open-loop to closed-loop gap in E2E driving policies: Observational Domain Shift and Objective Mismatch. Proposes practical remedy bridging the OL-CL gap.

papers.title: Multi-ORFT: Stable Online Reinforcement Fine-Tuning for Multi-Agent Diffusion Planning in Cooperative Driving
papers.abstract: Stable online RL fine-tuning for multi-agent diffusion planners in cooperative driving scenarios with closed-loop evaluation.

papers.title: FeaXDrive: Feasibility-aware Trajectory-Centric Diffusion Planning for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: End-to-end diffusion planning for autonomous driving addressing physical feasibility of generated trajectories. Proposes feasibility-aware trajectory-centric formulation that enforces kinematic constraints and geometric regularity in the diffusion process.

papers.title: CooperDrive: Enhancing Driving Decisions Through Cooperative Perception
papers.abstract: Cooperative perception framework augmenting situational awareness in occlusion/NLOS scenarios for autonomous vehicles.

papers.title: Asset Harvester: Extracting 3D Assets from Autonomous Driving Logs for Simulation
papers.abstract: Extracts 3D assets from AV driving logs for closed-loop simulation, enabling scalable testing and safety validation.

papers.title: Mask World Model: Predicting What Matters for Robust Robot Policy Learning
papers.abstract: Video diffusion predicts semantic masks instead of pixels. Forces model to learn essential dynamics. Outperforms RGB-based world models on LIBERO and RLBench.

papers.title: MISTY: High-Throughput Motion Planning via Mixer-based Single-step Drifting
papers.abstract: Multi-modal trajectory generation is essential for safe autonomous driving, yet existing diffusion-based planners suffer from high inference latency due to iterative neural function evaluations. MISTY proposes mixer-based single-step drifting for high-throughput motion planning.

papers.title: Large Language Model based Interactive Decision-Making for Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: LLM-based interactive decision-making framework for high-conflict mixed-traffic scenarios. Uses Object-Process Methodology for semantic modeling of multi-vehicle scenes, enhancing intent-aware interaction between human-driven and autonomous vehicles.

papers.title: VLM-VPI: A Vision-Language Reasoning Framework for Improving Automated Vehicle-Pedestrian Interactions
papers.abstract: Autonomous driving systems often infer pedestrian yielding behavior from geometric and kinematic cues alone, limiting their ability to reason about visual scene context and age-dependent behavioral variance. Proposes VLM-VPI for reasoning-informed vehicle-pedestrian interactions.

papers.title: TopoHR: Hierarchical Centerline Representation for Cyclic Topology Reasoning in Driving Scenes with Point-to-Instance Relations
papers.abstract: Topology reasoning is crucial for autonomous driving. Proposes hierarchical centerline representation and point-to-instance relational modeling for cyclic topology reasoning in driving scenes.

papers.title: Discrete Diffusion Policies are Natural Asynchronous Executors
papers.abstract: Proposes DiscreteRTC using discrete diffusion policies for asynchronous execution. Discrete diffusion naturally supports inpainting (native operation), fine-tuning free, with early stopping providing adaptive guidance. 50% higher success rate in real-world dynamic pick tasks vs flow-matching-based RTC, only 0.7x computation of full generation.

papers.title: Leveraging Previous-Traversal Point Cloud Map Priors for Camera-Based 3D Object Detection and Tracking
papers.abstract: Camera-only inference framework that retrieves static point cloud map priors from previous traversals to mitigate LiDAR absence during deployment. Uses BEV representations for map-query interaction, achieving competitive 3D detection without online LiDAR.

papers.title: Control Your Queries: Heterogeneous Query Interaction for Camera-Radar Fusion
papers.abstract: Novel camera-radar 3D object detector using heterogeneous query interaction. Combines image queries, radar queries, and learnable world queries distributed in 3D space. Introduces heterogeneous query mixing (QMix) for cross-type interaction among disparate query modalities.

papers.title: Instance-Guided Radar Depth Estimation for 3D Object Detection
papers.abstract: Instance-guided radar depth estimation for improved 3D object detection.

papers.title: Towards Viewpoint-Robust End-to-End Autonomous Driving with 3D Foundation Model Priors
papers.abstract: Uses 3D foundation model priors (depth + cross-attention) for viewpoint-robust E2E driving. CVPR 2026 Workshop on Simulation for AD.

papers.title: HorizonWeaver: Generalizable Multi-Level Semantic Editing for Driving Scenes
Not All Agents Matter: From Global Attention Dilution to Risk-Prioritized Game Planning
MotionScape: A Large-Scale Real-World Highly Dynamic UAV Video Dataset for World Models
papers.abstract: Large-scale real-world UAV video dataset capturing highly dynamic camera trajectories for training world models. Addresses distribution bias in existing datasets that limits world model performance under dynamic 3D environments.

papers.title: Orion-Lite: Distilling LLM Reasoning into Efficient Vision-Only Driving Models
FishRoPE: Projective Rotary Position Embeddings for Omnidirectional Visual Perception
papers.abstract: Lightweight framework adapting frozen vision foundation models for fisheye cameras via projective rotary position embeddings. Enables geometrically consistent BEV representation from surround-view fisheye cameras without retraining foundation models.

papers.title: WM-DAgger: Enabling Efficient Data Aggregation for Imitation Learning with World Models
RAD-2: Scaling Reinforcement Learning in a Generator-Discriminator Framework
From Particles to Perils: SVGD-Based Hazardous Scenario Generation for Autonomous Driving Systems Testing
papers.abstract: SVGD-based scenario generation for ADS safety testing

papers.title: GOLD-BEV: Ground and Aerial Data for Dense Semantic BEV Mapping of Dynamic Scenes
papers.abstract: Framework for learning dense BEV semantic maps of dynamic agents from ego-centric sensors, using time-synchronized aerial imagery as training supervision. BEV-aligned aerial crops provide intuitive target space for dense annotation without manual labeling.

papers.title: X-Cache: Cross-Chunk Block Caching for Few-Step Autoregressive World Models
papers.abstract: KV-cache optimization for world model efficiency

papers.title: ParkingScenes: A Structured Dataset for End-to-End Autonomous Parking in Simulation Scenes
EgoDyn-Bench: Evaluating Ego-Motion Understanding in Vision-Centric Foundation Models for Autonomous Driving
Transferable Physical-World Adversarial Patches Against Object Detection in Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Transferable physical-world adversarial patches against object detection in autonomous driving. Addresses threats to AD perception reliability.

papers.title: UniAda: Universal Adaptive Multi-objective Adversarial Attack for End-to-End Autonomous Driving Systems
papers.abstract: Universal adaptive multi-objective adversarial attack for end-to-end autonomous driving systems. Tests reliability of E2E AD against subtle perturbations to the input.

papers.title: Learning to Identify Out-of-Distribution Objects for 3D LiDAR Anomaly Segmentation
papers.abstract: Understanding the surrounding environment is fundamental in autonomous driving and robotic perception. Distinguishing between known classes and previously unseen objects is crucial. Proposes OOD anomaly segmentation for 3D LiDAR.

papers.title: ESIA: An Energy-Based Spatiotemporal Interaction-Aware Framework for Pedestrian Intention Prediction
papers.abstract: Energy-based spatiotemporal interaction-aware framework for pedestrian intention prediction. Uses Conditional Random Field (CRF) to model temporal dynamics, social interactions, and environmental context, improving robustness and interpretability.

papers.title: CLLAP: Contrastive Learning-based LiDAR-Augmented Pretraining for Enhanced Radar-Camera Fusion
papers.abstract: Contrastive learning-based LiDAR-augmented pretraining framework enhancing radar-camera fusion for 3D object detection. Leverages abundant LiDAR data as supervisory signal without requiring expensive radar annotations.

papers.title: Projected Attainable Speed Space: A Driving Efficiency Metric Connecting Instantaneous Evaluation to Travel Time
papers.abstract: Projected Attainable Speed Space (PASS) model - a unified driving efficiency metric connecting instantaneous evaluation to travel-level outcomes. Addresses limitations of speed, relative speed, and inter-vehicle distance indicators for self-driving decision-making.

papers.title: ARETE: Attention-based Rasterized Encoding for Topology Estimation using HSV-transformed Crowdsourced Vehicle Fleet Data
papers.abstract: DETR-based approach for generating centerlines and lane dividers from crowdsourced vehicle trajectories. Uses rasterized HSV-transformed trajectory data with attention-based encoding for HD map generation.

papers.title: Towards Lawful Autonomous Driving: Deriving Scenario-Aware Driving Requirements from Traffic Laws and Regulations
papers.abstract: Driving in compliance with traffic laws is a basic requirement for human drivers, yet AVs can violate these requirements in diverse real-world scenarios. Proposes deriving scenario-aware driving requirements from traffic laws.

papers.title: TEACar: An Open-Source Autonomous Driving Platform
papers.abstract: 1/14-1/16-scale open-source autonomous driving platform with modular mechanical architecture, hardware abstraction, and ROS 2-based software stack. Supports realistic hardware-in-the-loop validation for vision-based perception and learning-based control.

papers.title: DLWM: Dual Latent World Models enable Holistic Gaussian-centric Pre-training in Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Vision-based autonomous driving has gained much attention due to its low costs and excellent performance...

papers.title: DriveDreamer-Policy: A Geometry-Grounded World-Action Model for Unified Generation and Planning
papers.abstract: Recently, world-action models (WAM) have emerged to bridge vision-language-action (VLA) models and world models...

papers.title: Sim2Real-AD: A Modular Sim-to-Real Framework for Deploying VLM-Guided Reinforcement Learning in Real-World Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: 提出模块化sim-to-real框架，实现CARLA训练的VLM引导RL策略零样本迁移到实车。包含几何观测桥接(BEV转换)、物理感知动作映射、两阶段渐进训练策略等组件。在Ford E-Transit实车上实现90%/80%/75%的成功率(car-following/避障/停车标志)。

papers.title: Scaling-Aware Data Selection for End-to-End Autonomous Driving Systems
papers.abstract: Large-scale deep learning models for physical AI applications depend on diverse training data collection efforts...

papers.title: Long-SCOPE: Fully Sparse Long-Range Cooperative 3D Perception
papers.authors: Jiahao Wang, Zikun Xu, Yuner Zhang et al.
papers.abstract: 面向车联网(V2X)的全稀疏长距离协同3D感知框架。解决密集BEV表示二次计算复杂度和远距离特征关联脆弱性问题。包含几何引导查询生成(GQG)模块和可学习上下文感知关联模块。

papers.title: MVAdapt: Zero-Shot Multi-Vehicle Adaptation for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: E2E driving models degrade substantially when deployed on vehicles with different dynamics (size, mass, drivetrain). Proposes zero-shot multi-vehicle adaptation addressing this vehicle-domain gap without retraining.

papers.title: Unveiling the Surprising Efficacy of Navigation Understanding in End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Analyzes how end-to-end driving systems rely on global navigation vs local scene understanding. Shows many E2E models over-rely on local understanding and fail to utilize global navigation information, revealing weak correlation between planning capabilities and navigation understanding.

papers.title: CTAB: Radar-Camera BEV Multi-Task Learning with Cross-Task Attention Bridge for Joint 3D Detection and Segmentation
papers.abstract: 雷达-相机BEV多任务学习框架。提出跨任务注意力桥接模块(CTAB)，在检测和分割分支间通过多尺度可变形注意力交换特征。包含IN归一化分割解码器和可学习BEV上采样。在nuScenes上7类分割提升。

papers.title: World-Value-Action Model: Implicit Planning for Vision-Language-Action Systems
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as a promising paradigm for building embodied agents that ground perception and language into action...

papers.title: POMDP-based Object Search with Growing State Space and Hybrid Action Domain
papers.abstract: Efficiently locating target objects in complex indoor environments with diverse furniture, such as shelves, tables, and beds, is a significant challenge for mobile robots...

papers.title: AD4AD: Benchmarking Visual Anomaly Detection Models for Safer Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Benchmarks visual anomaly detection models for autonomous driving, addressing out-of-distribution obstacle detection.

papers.title: A Survey on Causality for Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: 因果推断在自动驾驶中的系统性综述。涵盖因果发现、因果推理、反事实推理在感知、决策、规划、控制中的应用。

papers.title: Driving Risk Emerges from the Required Two-Dimensional Joint Evasive Acceleration
papers.abstract: Safety benchmark for autonomous driving modeling risk as 2D joint evasive acceleration instead of 1D TTC.

papers.title: Localization-Guided Foreground Augmentation in Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Foreground augmentation for autonomous driving under adverse visibility conditions using HD map priors.

papers.title: ST-Prune: Training-Free Spatio-Temporal Token Pruning for Vision-Language Models in Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Training-free spatio-temporal token pruning method for VLMs in autonomous driving. Exploits inherent redundancies in multi-view camera and multi-frame video inputs to reduce computational overhead.

papers.title: Unposed-to-3D: Learning Simulation-Ready Vehicles from Real-World Images
papers.authors: Hongyuan Liu, Bochao Zou, Qiankun Liu et al.
papers.abstract: 从真实驾驶图像中学习重建仿真就绪3D车辆。两阶段框架：先训练图像到3D生成器，再引入尺度感知和姿态对齐适应模块。解决合成数据域差距和车辆姿态/尺度不匹配问题。

papers.title: PanDA: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Multimodal 3D Panoptic Segmentation in Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: First study on UDA for multimodal 3D panoptic segmentation in autonomous driving using pseudo-labeling strategies.

papers.title: Unified World-Action Model for End-to-End Autonomous Driving with Geometric Consistency
papers.abstract: We present a novel unified world-action model that integrates geometric consistency constraints into end-to-end autonomous driving. Our approach uses differentiable rendering to ensure physical plausibility of predicted trajectories and generates high-fidelity future scenes.

papers.title: VLA-Drive: Vision-Language-Action Model with Dynamic Scene Graph Reasoning
papers.abstract: We propose VLA-Drive, a vision-language-action model that incorporates dynamic scene graph reasoning for better understanding of complex driving scenarios. The model can reason about object relationships and predict their future states.

papers.title: BEVFormer++: Enhanced Bird's Eye View Perception with Temporal Fusion
papers.abstract: We present BEVFormer++, an enhanced version of BEVFormer that incorporates temporal fusion mechanisms for more accurate perception in autonomous driving. The model achieves state-of-the-art performance on nuScenes benchmark.

papers.title: Diffusion Policy for Robust Autonomous Driving in Adverse Conditions
papers.abstract: We propose a diffusion-based policy network for autonomous driving that demonstrates robustness in adverse weather conditions. The model uses denoising diffusion process to generate safe trajectories.

papers.title: LLM-Agent for Interactive Autonomous Driving with Natural Language Commands
papers.abstract: We develop an LLM-based agent system for interactive autonomous driving that can understand and execute natural language commands from passengers. The system shows strong performance in human-vehicle interaction tasks.

papers.title: Physics-Informed World Models for Autonomous Driving Simulation
papers.abstract: We introduce physics-informed world models that incorporate physical constraints into the simulation process, enabling more realistic driving scenario generation for training autonomous driving systems.

papers.title: Multi-Modal Fusion for End-to-End Autonomous Driving with Uncertainty Estimation
papers.abstract: We propose a multi-modal fusion framework for end-to-end autonomous driving that incorporates uncertainty estimation to improve safety and reliability in complex driving scenarios.

papers.title: From Scene to Object: Text-Guided Dual-Gaze Prediction for Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Interpretable driver attention prediction for human-like autonomous driving using VLM-based dual-gaze prediction with text-grounded object-level annotations.

papers.title: Toward Cooperative Driving in Mixed Traffic: An Adaptive Potential Game-Based Approach with Field Test Verification
papers.abstract: Connected autonomous vehicles cooperative decision-making using adaptive potential game theory with real field testing.

papers.title: Lightweight Low-SNR-Robust Semantic Communication System for Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: 面向车联网协同感知的轻量级低SNR鲁棒语义通信系统。基于深度联合源信道编码，包含结构化剪枝、均匀量化和M-QAM调制。在Cityscapes上验证，剪枝50%参数仍保持性能。

papers.title: X-Cache: Cross-Chunk Block Caching for Few-Step Autoregressive World Models Inference
papers.abstract: Real-time world simulation for autonomous driving. Proposes cross-chunk block caching to accelerate autoregressive world model inference for driving simulation. Driving world models built on autoregressive video diffusion achieve high-fidelity controllable multi-camera generation but are bottlenecked by inference cost.

papers.title: OVPD: A Virtual-Physical Fusion Testing Dataset of On-Site Autonomous Driving Challenge
papers.abstract: Testing dataset for autonomous driving fusing virtual simulation with real physical testing data, providing replayable and diagnosable scenarios.

papers.title: Temporal Difference Calibration in Sequential Tasks: Application to Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.abstract: Temporal difference calibration method for VLA models in sequential tasks, improving temporal consistency of action generation.

papers.title: PokeVLA: Empowering Pocket-Sized Vision-Language-Action Model with Comprehensive World Knowledge Guidance
papers.abstract: Recent advances in Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have opened new avenues for robot manipulation, yet existing methods exhibit limited efficiency and a lack of high-level knowledge and spatial awareness. To address these challenges, we propose PokeVLA, a lightweight yet powerful foundation model for embodied manipulation that effectively infuses vision-language understanding into action learning.

papers.title: Reasoning About Traversability: Language-Guided Off-Road 3D Trajectory Planning
papers.abstract: VLM引导的非结构化道路3D轨迹规划。提出语言精炼框架和几何感知偏好优化策略。在ORAD-3D基准上轨迹误差从1.01m降至0.97m，可行驶一致性从0.621提升至0.644。

papers.title: Frozen LLMs as Map-Aware Spatio-Temporal Reasoners for Vehicle Trajectory Prediction
papers.abstract: 利用冻结LLM作为推理引擎进行车辆轨迹预测。通过traffic encoder提取场景特征，CNN编码HD地图，reprogramming adapter将特征转化为LLM兼容token。可定量分析多模态信息影响，支持不同LLM架构的泛化。

papers.title: WorldMark: A Unified Benchmark Suite for Interactive Video World Models
papers.abstract: 统一的的交互式视频世界模型评测基准，将6个主流模型在相同场景和动作序列下进行公平比较。涵盖500个测试用例，含第一/三人称视角、不同光照风格和三个难度级别。提供在线评测平台(warena.ai)，支持未来模型对比。
